{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = miners
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Miners]] go inside the [[Transcendent Ruins]] to draw scales from the air.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
